'''Ostfrei''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Genarius]]. The moon was very dark, with its unique [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] keeping it in the shadow of Genarius most of the time. Its thick [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] prevented most of the light that the moon did receive from reaching down to the surface. Ostfrei was habitable at one time, but when [[Oblis]] was destroyed, Ostfrei was close enough to be affected. Asteroid impacts from the destruction started a seismic chain-reaction which left the moon uninhabitable.<ref name="LFC">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

There was not much of note on Ostfrei, so it was ignored by most of the residents of the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. Ships of the [[Thaere Privo|Thaereian]] Navy were sometimes seen around the moon. The Thaereians had a [[Thaereian military Ostfrei base|secret military base]] on Ostfrei since around [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], but no ships were seen going down to the moon's surface by observers.<ref name="LFC" />
